## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GTM team members and align on current projects and priorities for GrowthX's go-to-market efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Top priority: Create predictable pipeline for sales team (2-3X current lead volume)](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Publication launch (The Output) targeted for Friday, with final design elements in progress](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Two newsletters in development: The Output and GrowthX updates](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [HubSpot migration nearly complete; next step is to finalize email sequences and begin outreach](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Jason Gong: Leading GTM efforts, previously worked with Joe](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Ed Abazi: Developer, worked on AI-led growth website and client projects](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Joe Lehr: Focusing on CRM migration (Adio to HubSpot) and go-to-market infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Bianca Nieves: New hire (1 month), managing newsletters, events, and community efforts](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Rafid: Content creation, client support, and developing workstreams for engineers](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

  - [Case studies development](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

  - [Content auditing tool development (CheckThat)](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Priority: Predictable Pipeline Generation

  - [Current: 2-3 high-quality meetings/week](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Goal: 2 customer kickoffs/week (requires 5-6 qualified calls/week)](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Strategy: Leverage content distribution, social amplification, and events](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Challenge: Lack of tracking for lead sources](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

### HubSpot Migration and Outreach

  - [Migration nearly complete](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Next steps:](https://fathom.video/share/L1mFyG4bx8pBULUZGC9FrVsbof-m9DFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
    1.  Finalize copy for 3-touch email sequence
    2.  Review and filter down contact list in shared Google Sheet
    3.  Enroll selected contacts in HubSpot sequence
